message:
feat(raptorq): G7 expected-loss decision contract with structured logging and comprehensive tests

Add structured log emission (to_structured_log, Display impl), fix pre-existing
test assertions that didn't match the loss matrix behavior, and expand unit test
coverage from 3 to 19 tests covering healthy/degraded/regression/unknown states,
conflicting evidence, replay reproducibility, and edge cases.

Bead: asupersync-m7o6i

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
